About Me

I am Ayush Rai, a Computer Science undergraduate at Chitkara University with an interest in technology and software development. Coming from Amritsar, Punjab, I have been focusing on strengthening my fundamentals and building a strong understanding of programming concepts.

I enjoy working on practical projects that help me apply what I learn and improve my problem-solving skills. Alongside my technical learning, I am also interested in exploring the connection between computing and cognitive science in the long term.
